summary: Verified all 8 critical bugs on CaseDetail page for Belgian users. All bugs are FIXED. Fixed Bug 8 (Response Letters not showing) by correcting the API response parsing in CaseDetail.js. The letterTypes API returns {letter_types: [...]} but code was expecting array directly.

issues: Case title shows filename 'scanned_eviction.pdf' instead of AI-generated title - this case was analyzed BEFORE the bug fixes, so expected behavior. New cases will have AI-generated titles.

Bug 1 - Empty AI Analysis.evidence: case_eef4adb324a0 shows ai_summary (217 chars), key_insight (132 chars), and 12 findings with French content

Bug 2 - French UI Labels.evidence: All 5 risk score labels in French (Score de Risque, Financier, Urgence, Solidite juridique, Complexite). 'Analyse IA Archer' label present.

Bug 3 - Inline Legal References.evidence: 3 legal reference elements (data-testid='finding-legal-ref-{i}') and 3 jurisprudence elements (data-testid='finding-juris-{i}') found with Belgian law citations (Art. 20bis Loi 3/7/1978, Art. VI.82 CDE)

Bug 4 - Deadline Formatting.evidence: case_457ad1a7f22d shows 'Action requise dans 1 jour' in French with yellow color (#f59e0b) for deadline within 7 days

Bug 5 - Outcome Predictor Timeout.evidence: Predict button works, prediction result displayed within 30s timeout. No infinite spinner.

Bug 6 - Case Title.evidence: case_eef4adb324a0 shows AI-generated title 'Analyse contrat de travail incomplet - elements essentiels' (not filename)

Bug 8 - Response Letters.evidence: 8 Belgian letter types displayed with French descriptions (Demande de motifs de licenciement, Contestation du preavis, etc.)
Bug 8 - Response Letters.fix_applied: Changed line 189-190 in CaseDetail.js to extract letter_types from API response object: setLetterTypes(ltRes.data?.letter_types || ltRes.data || [])

critical_code_review_comments: Bug 8 root cause: API /api/letters/types/{case_type} returns {case_type, letter_types, country} but CaseDetail.js was setting ltRes.data directly to letterTypes state instead of ltRes.data.letter_types
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.js (line 189-190: fixed letter types API response parsing)

test_cases_used.case_eef4adb324a0: Employment case analyzed AFTER bug fixes - has full French AI content, AI-generated title, all features working
test_cases_used.case_457ad1a7f22d: Eviction case with deadline 2026-04-11 - used to verify Bug 4 deadline formatting

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 CaseDetail bugs verified fixed. Bug 8 required a frontend fix (letter types API response parsing). Cases analyzed BEFORE the bug fixes (like case_457ad1a7f22d) will still show old behavior (filename as title, English content) - this is expected. Only newly analyzed cases will have the fixes applied. Test case case_eef4adb324a0 is the best case to verify all fixes.
